raw_consumer_statement:
This complaint concerns Citibanks failure to properly escalate and investigate a disputed charge involving a refundable deposit that was misprocessed as a sale, resulting in ongoing financial harm. I am filing this complaint regarding Citibanks handling of a credit card billing dispute and its failure to follow standard chargeback and consumer protection procedures. 

I am a Citibank credit card holder ( XXXX ) and initiated a dispute regarding a XXXX charge from a merchant, XXXX XXXX ( XXXX ). The charge was represented to me as a refundable authorization hold / security deposit, but was instead processed as a completed sale. No damage was found, no invoice or damage documentation was issued, and no refund has been provided. 

I have repeatedly requested that Citibank escalate this matter to a formal chargeback under XXXX dispute rules for failure to refund a deposit, and that the provisional credit be reinstated during the investigation. Despite multiple phone calls and written requests, Citibank has failed to do so. 

Specifically : I have contacted Citibanks dispute department multiple times by phone and email. 
I was repeatedly told my request was being sent to the appropriate department, but no escalation occurred. 
On a call with a supervisor ( XXXX, XXXX, FL office ), I was informed that dispute agents do not have authority to reinstate provisional credit or escalate the case, and that only an investigation team can do so. 
I was not provided a direct contact for that team. 
I was told someone would contact me. No one has. 

It has now been more than XXXX days since my last written escalation request, with no response of any kind. 

As a result of Citibanks inaction : Provisional credit has not been reinstated. 
Interest continues to accrue on a disputed charge. 
I am experiencing financial harm and loss of access to the protections I reasonably expect as a XXXX cardholder. 
I am being forced to re-engage directly with the merchant, undermining the purpose of the dispute process. 

Citibank has failed to provide clear escalation, timely investigation, or meaningful communication, and appears to be routing me in a circular process where no department takes responsibility. 

I am requesting that Citibank : Immediately escalate this dispute to the appropriate chargeback investigation team. 
Reinstate the provisional credit during the investigation. 
Cease interest accrual related to the disputed amount. 
Provide written confirmation of the actions taken. 

I am requesting CFPB assistance to ensure Citibank complies with its obligations under credit card dispute handling and consumer protection standards. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX United States
